holdings.infoBox: KVLE is an equity ETF with a total of 84 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.05%, Microsoft at 5.07%, Broadcom at 3.82%, Alphabet at 2.76%, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.16%.

overview.description: The KraneShares Value Line Dynamic Dividend Equity Index ETF (KVLE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Value Line Dynamic Dividend Equity index. The fund tracks a multi-factor-weighted index of US large-cap stocks with high dividend yields and rated highly on a safety and timeliness ranking system. KVLE was launched on Nov 24, 2020 and is issued by KraneShares.
infoTable: Value Line Dynamic Dividend Equity Index
